description: Legal query in Judaeo-Arabic addressed to "sayyidnā al-shelishi" regarding a man who died and left his entire estate to one of his two cousins, but did not explicitly exclude the other one, to whom he gave the equivalent of a peruṭa (penny). A more complete version of T-S G1.2 (PGPID 1307). (AA)
description_he: שאלה משפטית ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
